title: Digital technology - Ministry of Education
content:
Find out about devices in schools and kura, and keeping your child safe online.
- Learning and curriculum 1
- Online safety and responsible use 1
- Te kōwhiri pūrere mā tō tamaiti Choosing a device for your child How to select the right BYOD device for your child.
How to select the right BYOD device for your child.
- Te whakakore i ngā Pūrere Matihiko e Tautika ana Equitable Digital Access (EDA) device decommission The Equitable Digital Access (EDA) programme ended in 2024. On 1 September 2025, all remaining EDA devices will automatically reset and will no longer be managed by us or receive updates.
The Equitable Digital Access (EDA) programme ended in 2024. On 1 September 2025, all remaining EDA devices will automatically reset and will no longer be managed by us or receive updates.
- Te tiaki ākonga ki te ipurangi Keeping students safe online With increasing reliance on technology for learning, schools need to keep students safe online. There are many safety tools schools use to support online safety.
With increasing reliance on technology for learning, schools need to keep students safe online. There are many safety tools schools use to support online safety.
- Te whakamahi waea ki te kura Using phones at school Phones away for the day rules mean students cannot use or access their phone at school, including during lunch time and breaks.
Phones away for the day rules mean students cannot use or access their phone at school, including during lunch time and breaks.
